title: System Informer Settings (settings.json)
description: Schema for System Informer JSON settings file. Includes known keys and allows additional plugin keys. Each property description contains value-format notes plus a setting description.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor tooling.

AllowOnlyOneInstance.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: When enabled (1), allow only one running instance; when disabled (0), multiple instances may be launched.

CloseOnEscape.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: When enabled (1), allow closing the window using the ESC (escape) key; when disabled (0), do not allow closing the window using the ESC key.

DbgHelpSearchPath.description: Setting: The search path used for symbol resolution. Contains a semicolon-delimited list of local paths and symbol server connection strings (e.g. srv*C:\Symbols*https://msdl.microsoft.com/download/symbols) used to locate PDB files.

DbgHelpUndecorate.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Controls whether C++ decorated symbol names are undecorated (demangled) into human-readable function signatures.

DisabledPlugins.description: Setting: A list of disabled plugins. Contains the filenames of plugins that are prevented from loading.

ElevationLevel.description: Controls the default action when elevation is required. For example, the application automatically prompts for administrative privileges.

EnableAdvancedOptions.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the Advanced tab in the settings user interface, unlocking additional functionality.

EnableAvxSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables use of AVX SIMD instructions for performance; can be disabled (set to 0) if AVX-related crashes occur.

EnableBitmapSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables support for bitmaps in menus and user interface elements.

EnableBreakOnTermination.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the 'Critical' option in process context menus, allowing users to mark processes as critical (termination causes a system crash).

EnableBootObjectsEnumerate.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Controls the enumeration of boot objects in the main menu.

EnableCommandLineTooltips.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables tooltips that display the full command line arguments when hovering over a process.

EnableCycleCpuUsage.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Calculates CPU usage based on CPU cycles consumed rather than time intervals, providing more accurate usage data.

EnableDeferredLayout.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Defers the layout and redrawing of the main window to improve performance; can be disabled (set to 0) if window-related artefacts occur.

EnableDeviceSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the monitoring and enumeration of hardware devices and drivers.

EnableDeviceNotifySupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables notifications for device arrival and removal events.

EnableImageCoherencySupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables scanning of memory images to detect modifications or code injection compared to the file on disk.

EnableInstantTooltips.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables instant display of tooltips without a delay when hovering over UI elements.

EnableHeapReflection.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the use of heap reflection (Process Snapshotting) to inspect heap memory without suspending the target process.

EnableHeapMemoryTagging.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables support for Heap Memory Tagging (MTE) to help detect memory corruption issues.

EnableLastProcessShutdown.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Configures System Informer to shutdown as the last application during system shutdown, allowing for diagnostics of the shutdown process.

EnableLinuxSubsystemSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables detection and monitoring of Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) processes and distributions.

EnableHandleSnapshot.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the snapshotting of handles for enumeration, allowing the display of open handles for processes.

EnableMinidumpKernelMinidump.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the generation of kernel minidumps when preforming a process minidump.

EnableMinidumpSnapshot.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the use of process snapshotting (PSS) when creating minidumps to capture the process state without suspending the process.

EnableMonospaceFont.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the use of a monospaced font for list views and text displays.

EnableNetworkBoundConnections.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of network bound connections (listening ports) in the Network tab.

EnableNetworkResolve.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the resolution of remote IP addresses to hostnames.

EnableNetworkResolveDoH.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables DNS over HTTPS (DoH) for network address resolution to improve privacy and security.

EnableMemStringsTreeDialog.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the use of a tree view dialog for displaying memory strings.

EnablePackageIconSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of icons for Windows Store packaged processes.

EnableProcessHandlePnPDeviceNameSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables resolving Plug and Play (PnP) device names from process handles.

EnablePlugins.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the loading of plugins at startup.

EnablePluginsNative.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the loading of plugins at startup using an alternative method.

EnableGraphMaxScale.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables automatic scaling of graphs to the maximum value observed.

EnableGraphMaxText.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of the maximum value as text on graphs.

EnableServiceNonPoll.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables event-based monitoring for service status changes instead of periodic polling, improving performance.

EnableServiceNonPollNotify.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables notifications for service status changes when non-polling monitoring is active.

EnableServiceStage2.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables a secondary, more detailed enumeration of service information.

EnableServiceProgressDialog.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of a progress dialog during service control operations (e.g., start, stop).

EnableShellExecuteSkipIfeoDebugger.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables bypassing of Image File Execution Options (IFEO) debuggers when launching processes via ShellExecute.

EnableStage2.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the second stage of process information, such as image verification and signature scanning.

EnableStreamerMode.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables Streamer Mode, which redacts the entire application and sensitive information during screen sharing to protect your privacy.

EnableStartAsAdmin.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Configures the application to automatically run as Administrator at startup.

EnableStartAsAdminAlwaysOnTop.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Keeps the window on top of other windows when the application is started with administrative privileges.

EnableDefaultSafePlugins.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the loading of the default set of safe plugins.

EnableSecurityAdvancedDialog.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the advanced security descriptor editor for viewing and modifying object permissions.

EnableShortRelativeStartTime.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Displays start times using a short relative format (e.g. '1m ago') instead of absolute timestamps.

EnableShutdownCriticalMenu.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of critical shutdown options in the shutdown menu.

EnableShutdownBootMenu.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of boot options in the shutdown menu.

EnableSilentCrashNotify.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables reporting of silent application crashes to the local system.

EnableThemeSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables support for custom themes (e.g. Dark Mode).

EnableThemeAcrylicSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables Acrylic (blur) material effects in the user interface.

EnableThemeAcrylicWindowSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables Acrylic (blur) effects for the main window background.

EnableThemeAnimation.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables animations for UI elements within the custom theme.

EnableThemeNativeButtons.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Forces the use of native Windows-style buttons instead of custom themed buttons.

EnableThreadStackInlineSymbols.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the resolution and display of inline function symbols in thread stacks.

EnableThreadStackLineInformation.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the retrieval and display of source line information for symbols in thread stacks.

EnableTokenRemovedPrivileges.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of privileges that have been removed from a process token.

EnableTooltipSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of tooltips for various user interface elements.

EnableUpdateDefaultFirmwareBootEntry.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Updates the default firmware boot entry to the next selected boot option.

EnableVersionSupport.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the extraction and display of file version information.

EnableWarnings.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables general warning dialogs for potentially dangerous actions.

EnableWarningsRunas.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the warning dialog displayed when using the 'Run As' feature.

EnableWindowText.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the display of text in the window title.

HideDefaultServices.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides default system services from the service list.

HideDriverServices.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides driver services from the service list.

HideFreeRegions.description:

HideOnClose.description:

HideOnMinimize.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Minimizes the application to the system tray when the window is minimized.

HideOtherUserProcesses.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides processes belonging to other users.

HideSignedProcesses.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides processes that have a valid digital signature.

HideMicrosoftProcesses.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides processes that are signed by Microsoft.

HideWaitingConnections.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Hides network connections in a waiting state.

HighlightingDuration.description:
Unsigned integer encoded as hexadecimal (up to 32-bit).

Setting: Sets the duration (in milliseconds) that new and terminated processes remain highlighted.

IconBalloonShowIcon.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Controls the visibility of balloon notifications for the tray icon.

IconBalloonMuteSound.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Mutes the sound associated with tray icon balloon notifications.

ToastNotifyEnabled.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables the use of Windows toast notifications instead of classic balloon tips.

IconTrayGuids.description: Setting: Stores the GUIDs of tray icons to persist or manage.

IconTrayPersistGuidEnabled.description:

Setting: Enables persistence of tray icon GUIDs to maintain settings across restarts.

IconTrayLazyStartDelay.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Delays the creation of the tray icon at startup.

IconIgnoreBalloonClick.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Ignores clicks on the tray icon balloon notifications.

IconSettings.description: Setting: Stores configuration data for tray icons.

IconNotifyMask.description:
Unsigned integer encoded as hexadecimal (up to 32-bit).

Setting: Bitmask controlling which events trigger tray icon notifications.

IconProcesses.description:
Unsigned integer encoded as hexadecimal (up to 32-bit).

IconSingleClick.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Enables opening the main window with a single click on the tray icon.

IconTogglesVisibility.description:
Boolean-like flag stored as '0' or '1'.

Setting: Configures the tray icon click to toggle main window visibility (hide/show).

IconTransparencyEnabled.description:
